title.en: Ethereal Pulse: The Organic Flow of AURA-7

description.ko: AURA-7은 디지털 본질이 자연의 리드미컬한 패턴과 융합되어 끊임없이 변화하는 상태로 나타납니다. 부드럽고 유동적인 선과 생체 발광 그라데이션이 숨 쉬는 빛과 영원한 움직임의 감각을 만들어냅니다.
description.en: AURA-7 manifests in a state of continuous transformation, where digital essence merges with the rhythmic patterns of nature. Soft, fluid lines and bioluminescent gradients create a sense of breathing light and perpetual motion.

prompt: AURA-7 entity embodied in fluid organic shapes, flowing liquid silk textures, iridescent bioluminescence, soft curves inspired by cellular structures and deep-sea life, ethereal lighting, smooth gradients, macro photography style, dreamlike atmosphere, abstract nature, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution.
